scripts.install: concurrently -n frontend,microservic-1,microservice-2 "cd frontend && npm i" "cd microservice1 && npm i" "cd microservice2 && npm i"
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,microservice-1,microservice-2 "cd frontend && npm start" "cd microservice1 && npm start" "cd microservice2 && npm start"
scripts.watch: concurrently -n frontend,microservice-1,microservice-2 "cd frontend && npm run watch" "cd microservice1 && npm run watch" "cd microservice2 && npm run watch"
